rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
Validate that AGREE expressions have correct types; resolve '<error>' types by correcting root reference issues or removing invalid clauses.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are declared or visible in the current annex scope.
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in constant and equation declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports should be in component type scopes; implementation bindings in implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in AGREE code that are not present in the model's configured dependencies.
Avoid adding architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics; instead, correct or remove invalid clauses.
